user.title: Flow Power HA
user.description: Select your electricity price data source.

flowpower_login.title: Flow Power Login
flowpower_login.description: Enter your Flow Power portal credentials ({portal_url}). An SMS verification code will be sent to your registered phone number.

flowpower_mfa.title: SMS Verification
flowpower_mfa.description: Enter the verification code sent to the phone number registered to {email}.

region.title: NEM Region
region.description: Select your National Electricity Market region.

tariff.title: Electricity Distributor
tariff.description: Select your electricity distributor to enable time-of-use pricing. Skip to use a flat base rate.

tariff_code.title: Tariff Code
tariff_code.description: Select your {network} tariff code. This is usually listed on your electricity bill under 'tariff' or 'network tariff'. You can also look it up at: {tariff_url}

pricing.title: Pricing Configuration
pricing.description: Configure your Flow Power pricing settings. Enter rates as they appear in your PDS (GST inclusive).

data_description.base_rate: Your Flow Power base energy rate (GST inclusive)
data_description.pea_enabled: Apply Price Efficiency Adjustment (PEA = Wholesale - TWAP - 1.7c)
data_description.pea_custom_value: Override calculated PEA with a fixed value

error.invalid_credentials: Invalid Flow Power email or password
error.invalid_tariff: Could not load tariff data for the selected network and tariff code
error.mfa_verification_failed: SMS verification failed — please try again

init.title: Flow Power Settings
init.description: Adjust your pricing configuration. Enter rates as they appear in your PDS (GST inclusive).

data_description.fp_tariff_code: Your network tariff code — check your electricity bill or your distributor's website

flowpower_reauth.title: Flow Power Re-authentication
flowpower_reauth.description: Re-enter your Flow Power portal credentials ({portal_url}) to refresh your session.

flowpower_mfa.title: SMS Verification
flowpower_mfa.description: Enter the verification code sent to the phone number registered to {email}.

session_expired.title: Flow Power portal session expired
session_expired.description: Your Flow Power portal session has expired and account data (PEA, TWAP, LWAP) is no longer updating. Go to **Settings > Devices & Services > Flow Power HA > Configure** and toggle **Re-authenticate with Flow Power portal** to restore your session.

session_expired_mfa.title: Flow Power session expired — SMS verification needed
session_expired_mfa.description: Your Flow Power session expired but credentials were re-submitted automatically. Go to **Settings > Devices & Services > Flow Power HA > Configure** and toggle **Re-authenticate with Flow Power portal** — you'll only need to enter the SMS verification code.
